mapper.insert:
insert into `stock_bar_agg` ( `code`, `period_type`, `bar_date`, `first_trade_date`, `last_trade_date`, `open`, `high`, `low`, `close`, `volume`, `create_time`, `update_time`) values
(#{item.code}, #{item.periodType}, #{item.barDate}, #{item.firstTradeDate}, #{item.lastTradeDate}, #{item.open}, #{item.high}, #{item.low}, #{item.close}, #{item.volume}, now(), now())
on duplicate key update `first_trade_date` = values(first_trade_date), `last_trade_date` = values(last_trade_date), `open` = values(open), `high` = values(high), `low` = values(low), `close` = values(close), `volume` = values(volume), `update_time` = now()
mapper.sql: `id`, `code`, `period_type` as periodType, `bar_date` as barDate, `first_trade_date` as firstTradeDate, `last_trade_date` as lastTradeDate, `open`, `high`, `low`, `close`, `volume`
mapper.select: select from `stock_bar_agg` where `code` = #{code} and `period_type` = #{periodType} and `bar_date` = #{barDate} limit 1
